data.title: FedEx aiming for $3B increase in operating income through strategic initiatives, focusing on digital growth & profitability.
data.description: FedEx Corp (FDX) shares rose on Thursday during its 2026 Investor Day, where they outlined strategic priorities to reach financial goals by 2029. These goals include revenue of around $98 billion, operating income of about $8 billion, and adjusted free cash flow of approximately $6 billion. The company plans to keep aircraft-related spending under $1 billion and increase operating income by $3 billion through strategic initiatives. FedEx aims for a 10% operating margin in the U.S. Domestic segment and an 8% margin in the International segment. The acquisition of European parcel locker leader InPost at 15.60 euros per share is part of FedEx's strategy to enhance earnings and grow profitability through digital intelligence integration. FedEx CEO emphasized the importance of digital intelligence, which will strengthen their industrial network and boost shareholder returns.

data.title: SEO for Lawyers, LLC obtains federal trademark for LAWSEO® with Registration Number 8,130,429, confirming brand ownership.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Portland, Oregon, USPTO Registration No. 8,130,429 was granted to SEO for Lawyers, LLC, confirming their ownership and dominant position in the market. This federal trademark registration for LAWSEO® establishes their exclusive rights to the brand, further consolidating their leadership in the industry.

data.title: Cisco's cautious margin outlook caused tech selloff, VIX rose 16%. Cisco shares fell 11%, IGV sank 3.7%. APP fell 18%. HOOD slid 9%.
data.description: Wall Street experienced a volatile Thursday as tech and software stocks plummeted following Cisco Systems Inc.'s cautious margin outlook. Despite beating expectations, Cisco shares dropped over 11%, marking their worst single-day decline since May 2022. The iShares Tech-Expanded Software Sector ETF dipped 3.7%, reflecting concerns about AI-disruption risk. AppLovin Corp. also suffered, with a stock plunge of 18%, bringing their year-to-date decline to 45%. Robinhood Markets Inc. slid 9% amidst escalating pressures. The global memory and storage crunch further impacted the sector. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ultimea to launch Skywave X100 Dual wireless home theater system in March 2026 on Kickstarter.
data.description: Ultimea, a prominent player in immersive home entertainment, has revealed plans to debut its cutting-edge flagship system, the Skywave X100 Dual, on Kickstarter in March 2026. Following the success of the Skywave X70 in 2025, which garnered significant global acclaim, the company is poised to continue its innovative streak with this new release. The upcoming launch signifies Ultimea's commitment to pushing boundaries in the industry and delivering top-notch entertainment experiences to consumers.

data.title: HR Acuity introduces Trust & Risk Statement for ER impact measurement including dashboards for cost avoidance, risk prediction, trust earning. Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: Today, HR Acuity, a top player in employee relations (ER) case management and investigations software, unveiled a new executive dashboard designed to track key metrics such as cost avoidance, risk prediction, and trust gained. This launch, which took place in New York on February 12, 2026, marks a significant development for the company. The dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of important indicators, offering valuable insights for decision-makers. This initiative underscores HR Acuity's commitment to innovation and equipping organizations with tools to effectively monitor and enhance ER processes.

data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Houston, Direct Digital Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRCT) announced its significant presence in the advertising and marketing technology sector. data.title: iGarden and FFN unveiled exclusive partnership in smart aquatic tech, bolstering French market.
data.description: In Nice, France on February 12, 2026, iGarden, the cutting-edge brand under Fairland Group, joined forces with the Fédération Française de Natation (FFN) to announce a significant strategic collaboration. The partnership heralds a crucial advancement for both entities, showcasing the leading edge of smart aquatic technology in the industry.

data.title: Egan-Jones study looks at sovereign strategies in global business centers such as Singapore, New York, Switzerland, and Monaco.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Egan-Jones published a report analyzing the impact of varying national strategies on business location decisions in cities like Singapore, New York, Switzerland, and Monaco. This study delves into how these strategies contribute to the attraction of talent, capital, and legal establishments in a rapidly digitizing global landscape.

data.title: Northwestern Mutual Data Science Institute expands to include Medical College of Wisconsin, Milwaukee School of Engineering, and Waukesha County Technical College.
data.description: In Milwaukee on February 12, 2026, the Northwestern Mutual Data Science Institute (NMDSI) revealed its plans for expansion. This collaborative effort between Northwestern Mutual, Marquette University, and the University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee (UWM) is a unique venture. The institute will now be adding three new components to its existing framework.

data.title: KBroVet® is the first FDA-approved drug for canine seizures. It offers longest half-life. - PRNewswire, Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: A new once-daily chewable tablet has been introduced by Pegasus Laboratories, Inc. in Pensacola, Florida on February 12, 2026. This tablet, known as KBroVet® and marketed under the trademark PRN® Pharmacal, has the longest half-life among currently available seizure medications. This innovation is expected to greatly benefit patients with seizures.

data.title: Legrand acquires Kratos Industries and invests in Accelsius for AI-ready infrastructure. Strengthening power and thermal management portfolio.
data.description: Legrand has recently enhanced its comprehensive power and thermal management offerings for AI-compatible infrastructure, positioning the company as a key player in the sector. The developments were unveiled in West Hartford, Connecticut on February 12, 2026. Legrand, known for its expertise in electrical and digital building solutions, introduced two significant upgrades to its portfolio. This move underscores Legrand's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements and catering to the growing demand for cutting-edge infrastructure.

data.title: SleepAI.com launches AI-powered sleep and emotional wellness platform in LA, now on iOS and Google Play.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, SleepAI.com revealed the introduction of an AI-driven sleep and emotional wellness platform. This innovative platform is accessible on the iOS and Google Play app stores. The technology aims to tackle contemporary lifestyles, offering personalized support for improved sleep quality and emotional well-being.

data.title: Hyperproof's 2026 Benchmark Report shows AI adoption by 1,000+ professionals, links reactive risk programs to higher breach rates.
data.description: A recent study conducted by over 1,000 professionals in IT, security, risk, and compliance sectors has revealed a widespread adoption of artificial intelligence technology. The research also established a connection between reactive risk programs and increased breach rates. Moreover, the study emphasized a rising trend towards implementing scalable control strategies. Conducted in BELLEVUE, Wash., the findings were published on Feb. 12, 2026.

data.title: Socket Mobile (NASDAQ: SCKT) to release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 12; a leading data capture solutions provider.
data.description: The company Socket Mobile, Inc., based in Fremont, California, is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The announcement, scheduled for release at the end of the market day, is anticipated to provide insights into the company's economic standing. Socket Mobile, a prominent supplier of data capture and delivery services aimed at improving efficiency, operates under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: SCKT. Investors and industry analysts keen on tracking the company's progress are likely awaiting these figures to gauge its success and future prospects.

data.title: JLL secures $596M refinancing for The Crescent in Uptown Dallas, a mixed-use property featuring top luxury retailers.
data.description: In Dallas, on February 12, 2026, it was revealed that JLL's Capital Markets group successfully secured a refinancing of $596 million for a prestigious mixed-use property. This property boasts premium office space, renowned luxury retailers, and dining establishments, making it a sought-after destination in the city.
